q: Which payment methods are growing fastest this month compared to last month? Show percentage growth.
sql: SELECT payment_method, COALESCE((SUM(CASE WHEN transaction_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) THEN amount ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN transaction_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month') AND transaction_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) - 1) * 100.0, 0) AS growth_percentage FROM silver_transactions WHERE transaction_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month') AND transaction_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month' AND amount IS NOT NULL GROUP BY payment_method ORDER BY growth_percentage DESC;

q: Which 5 merchants have the highest refund rate? Show refund count and total transaction count.
sql: SELECT m.merchant_id, m.merchant_name, SUM(CASE WHEN st.status = 'REFUNDED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS refund_count, COUNT(DISTINCT st.transaction_id) AS total_transaction_count, (SUM(CASE WHEN st.status = 'REFUNDED' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT st.transaction_id), 0)) * 100 AS refund_rate_pct FROM merchants m JOIN silver_transactions st ON m.merchant_id = st.merchant_id WHERE st.quality_flag = 'PASS' AND st.transaction_date BETWEEN DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE) AND CURRENT_DATE GROUP BY m.merchant_id, m.merchant_name ORDER BY refund_rate_pct DESC LIMIT 5;
